ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "temp_min" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "temp_max" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "temp_avg" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "temp_dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature recorded */,
  "stn_pressure" REAL /* Station pressure recorded */,
  "day_length" INTEGER /* Day length recorded */,
  "ht_cool" INTEGER /* Heat cooling recorded */,
  "precip_total" REAL /* Total precipitation recorded */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the weather data was collected */,
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather type */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather station */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the weather data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_weather_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type_id") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_station ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement unit used for the weather type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_types_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being forecasted */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date of the forecast */,
  "forecast_temp_min" REAL /* Forecasted minimum temperature */,
  "forecast_temp_max" REAL /* Forecasted maximum temperature */,
  "forecast_precipitation" REAL /* Forecasted precipitation */,
  "forecast_type" TEXT /* Type of forecast (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., meteorologist, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the weather data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "temp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "temp_min1" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 1-day interval */,
  "temp_min2" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 2-day interval */,
  "temp_min4" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 4-day interval */,
  "temp_min7" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 7-day interval */,
  "temp_min10" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 10-day interval */,
  "temp_min14" REAL /* Minimum temperature at 14-day interval */,
  "temp_max1" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 1-day interval */,
  "temp_max2" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 2-day interval */,
  "temp_max4" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 4-day interval */,
  "temp_max7" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 7-day interval */,
  "temp_max10" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 10-day interval */,
  "temp_max14" REAL /* Maximum temperature at 14-day interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temperature data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the temperature data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precipitation_data" (
  "precip_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precipitation data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "precip_total1" REAL /* Total precipitation at 1-day interval */,
  "precip_total2" REAL /* Total precipitation at 2-day interval */,
  "precip_total4" REAL /* Total precipitation at 4-day interval */,
  "precip_total7" REAL /* Total precipitation at 7-day interval */,
  "precip_total10" REAL /* Total precipitation at 10-day interval */,
  "precip_total14" REAL /* Total precipitation at 14-day interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the precipitation data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the precipitation data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precip_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precipitation_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dew_point_data" (
  "dew_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dew point data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "dew_point1" REAL /* Dew point at 1-day interval */,
  "dew_point2" REAL /* Dew point at 2-day interval */,
  "dew_point4" REAL /* Dew point at 4-day interval */,
  "dew_point7" REAL /* Dew point at 7-day interval */,
  "dew_point10" REAL /* Dew point at 10-day interval */,
  "dew_point14" REAL /* Dew point at 14-day interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dew point data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the dew point data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dew_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dew_point_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "average_data" (
  "avg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each average data entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "avg1" REAL /* Average at 1-day interval */,
  "avg2" REAL /* Average at 2-day interval */,
  "avg4" REAL /* Average at 4-day interval */,
  "avg7" REAL /* Average at 7-day interval */,
  "avg10" REAL /* Average at 10-day interval */,
  "avg14" REAL /* Average at 14-day interval */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the average data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the average data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("avg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_average_data_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "meta_data" TEXT /* Metadata for the weather data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_station" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather station was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the weather station was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "quality_metric" TEXT /* Data quality metric for the weather data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data quality was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data quality was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being referenced */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the weather data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the research team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the team (e.g., leader, member) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)
